---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for HALT
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
Ex: "In the field, I need to _____ but currently HALT doesn't support _____."

## Proposed Solution

What you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Field Context

If this request comes from a real deployment scenario, describe the environment:
- **Setting**: (conflict zone, disaster area, clinic, training exercise)
- **Users**: (medics, nurses, team leaders)
- **Constraints**: (no internet, low power, limited devices)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
